## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are focused on a single logical change
- [ ] Tests added or updated, and the suite passes
- [ ] Lint and TypeScript type-checks pass (frontend and backend)
- [ ] Docs updated for any user-facing change
- [ ] No destructive schema changes — any migration is forward-only and preserves existing data
- [ ] No secrets, real personal log data, or `.env` files committed
